summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. The hydrated preflight artifact contains live state for 20 of 40 listed candidate PRs; those hydrated PRs are classified conservatively as independent inventory items. The remaining 20 candidate refs are not present in the hydrated item matrix, so their live state and target_updated_at are unavailable for this run and require a refreshed preflight artifact before classification.
